settings.question: What do you need from me to start a quote?
settings.answer: Anything is a starting point — a list of products, a room dimension, a headcount, or links to items you’ve seen on the site. You don’t need a finished floor plan or a confirmed budget to get numbers. We’ll ask a few follow-up questions if needed and get you an itemised quote, usually within one business day.

settings.question: Is there a minimum order to get a quote?
settings.answer: No minimum. We quote single chairs, full boardrooms, and everything in between. For very small orders (one or two items), the online store lets you purchase directly — the quote channel is most useful when you want product guidance, a free space plan, or OECM-formatted pricing.

settings.question: I’m an OECM buyer. What do I include in my quote request?
settings.answer:
Mention that you’re purchasing under OECM and include your organisation’s OECM member number. Brant Business Interiors holds Agreement 2025-470 in the office furniture category. We’ll format the quote against pre-tendered pricing and flag which line items are OECM-eligible so your purchasing team can approve it cleanly — no extra steps on your end.

Not sure if your organisation is OECM-eligible? See our OECM overview or call 1-800-835-9565 and we’ll confirm in five minutes.

settings.question: Do you include delivery and installation in quotes?
settings.answer: Yes — all quotes include delivery and installation as a separate line item so you can see the full landed cost. We deliver across Ontario and can install with our own crew. After-hours and weekend installs are available for occupied spaces. For out-of-province shipments, call us for a freight quote.

settings.question: Can I pay by purchase order (PO)?
settings.answer: Yes. Government bodies, school boards, hospitals, non-profits, and established businesses can place orders on account with a PO. Mention this when you request your quote and we’ll set up your account during the quoting process.

settings.hero_standfirst: Tell us what your space needs — chair count, desk specs, floor plan, or just a rough scope. Brant Business Interiors turns requests into itemised quotes, fast. No minimums. No sales pitch. Just the number you need to move your project forward.
settings.intro_heading: Send a scope. Get a quote. Place a PO.
settings.intro_para1: Most quotes start with a message or a call. Share your space details — room dimensions, headcount, product preferences, or links to items you’ve seen — and our Ontario-based team will assemble a line-item quote, typically within one business day. No travel, no showroom visit required before you have numbers on paper.
settings.contact_heading: Three ways to start your quote.
settings.contact_body: Use whatever’s fastest for you. All three channels go to the same Ontario team — you’ll hear back within 1 business day.
settings.form_meta: Describe your scope · attach a floor plan · we respond in 1 business day
settings.diff_heading: Four reasons Ontario buyers send us their scope.
settings.closer_heading: Send us your scope. We’ll send back a quote.
settings.closer_sub: Floor plan, product list, or rough headcount — any starting point works. One business day to a quote, one Ontario team from scope through installation.
settings.faq_heading: Common questions before the first quote.
